message: 🌱 Add logging-operator-kube-logging-: Ability to select namespaces by labels mission (#684)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "logging-operator-kube-logging-496-ability-to-select-namespaces-by-labels",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "logging-operator-kube-logging-: Ability to select namespaces by labels",
+    "description": "Ability to select namespaces by labels. Requested by 2+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current logging-operator-kube-logging- deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your logging-operator-kube-logging- version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n logging-operator-kube-logging- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=logging-operator-kube-logging-\nhelm list -n logging-operator-kube-logging- 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working logging-operator-kube-logging- installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review logging-operator-kube-logging- configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant logging-operator-kube-logging- configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n logging-operator-kube-logging- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=logging-operator-kube-logging-\nkubectl get configmap -n logging-operator-kube-logging- -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=logging-operator-kube-logging-\n```\nWe'd like to be able to define a ClusterFlow that defines an entire subset of namespaces which are labeled. This would allow teams to have a single ClusterFlow instead of potential hundreds of Flows."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Ability to select namespaces by labels",
+        "description": "Allow routing based on namespace labels if the feature is enabled in Fluent Bit, see: https://kube-logging.dev/4.6/docs/whats-new/#kubernetes-namespace-labels-and-annotations\n\nConfigure Fluent Bit in the Logging resource or separately like this:\n```\nkind: Logging\nspec:\n  fluentbit:\n   \n```yaml\nkind: Logging\nspec:\n  fluentbit:\n    filterKubernetes:\n      namespace_labels: \"On\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n logging-operator-kube-logging- -l app.kubernetes.io/name=logging-operator-kube-logging-\nkubectl get events -n logging-operator-kube-logging- --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Ability to select namespaces by labels\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Allow routing based on namespace labels if the feature is enabled in Fluent Bit, see: https://kube-logging.dev/4.6/docs/whats-new/#kubernetes-namespace-labels-and-annotations\n\nConfigure Fluent Bit in the Logging resource or separately like this:\n```\nkind: Logging\nspec:\n  fluentbit:\n    filterKubernetes:\n      namespace_labels: \"On\"\n```\n\nor\n\n```\nkind: FluentbitAgent\nspec:\n  filterKubernetes:\n   ",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kind: Logging\nspec:\n  fluentbit:\n    filterKubernetes:\n      namespace_labels: \"On\"",
+        "kind: FluentbitAgent\nspec:\n  filterKubernetes:\n    namespace_labels: \"On\"",
+        "apiVersion: logging.banzaicloud.io/v1beta1\nkind: ClusterFlow\nmetadata:\n  name: sample\nspec:\n  match:\n    - select:\n        namespace_labels:\n          tenant: devs\n  gblobalOutputRefs:\n    - example"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "logging-operator-kube-logging-",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "logging-operator-kube-logging-"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kube-logging/logging-operator/issues/496",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kube-logging/logging-operator",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kube-logging/logging-operator/pull/1757"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 12,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with logging-operator-kube-logging- installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:36:01.050Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
